scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/consumer" "npm run dev -w apps/partner" "npm run dev -w apps/admin" "npm run dev -w apps/pitch"
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run preview -w apps/consumer" "npm run preview -w apps/partner" "npm run preview -w apps/admin" "npm run preview -w apps/pitch"
